title: Protected Places and Areas: Subsidiary Legislation
title_en: Protected Places and Areas: Subsidiary Legislation

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Protected Places and Areas Order.

provisions.title: Declaration of protected areas, etc.
provisions.content:
2. Declaration of protected areas, etc.
The places or areas listed in the first column of the Schedule are declared to be protected places or areas, as the case may be, for the purposes of the Act.

provisions.title: Authorised officer
provisions.content:
3. Authorised officer
The person listed in the second column of the Schedule is declared to be an authorised officer in respect of the area in relation thereto in the first column of the Schedule.
